summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Skill Circuit inline CMS feature. All CMS functionality is working correctly including admin login, edit banner visibility, pencil icon hover states, inline editing workflow, content persistence to MongoDB, and proper access control for non-admin users.

issues: Image in 'The Employability Gap' section shows alt text instead of actual image - may be a broken image URL

passed_tests: GET /api/cms/home - Returns CMS content for homepage
GET /api/cms/about - Returns CMS content for about page
GET /api/cms/courses - Returns CMS content for courses page
GET /api/cms/contact - Returns CMS content for contact page
GET /api/cms/global - Returns CMS content for navbar/footer
PUT /api/admin/cms without auth - Returns 401 (correct)
PUT /api/admin/cms with admin auth - Updates content successfully
CMS content persists across page refreshes
Admin login with admin@skillcircuit.com / Chh@jer - Works correctly
Admin redirected to /admin dashboard after login
Admin Edit Banner visible on homepage when logged in as admin
Admin Edit Banner visible on About page when logged in as admin
Admin Edit Banner visible on Courses page when logged in as admin
Admin Edit Banner visible on Contact page when logged in as admin
Pencil icons appear on hover for editable content (101 on homepage, 68 on about, 47 on courses, 57 on contact)
Inline editing workflow: click pencil -> input field appears -> Save/Cancel buttons
Content saves successfully with toast notification 'Content updated successfully!'
Non-admin users (guests) cannot see Admin Edit Banner
Non-admin users (guests) cannot see pencil icons
CMS content persists to MongoDB and displays for all users
Navbar brand name editable via CMS
Footer content editable via CMS
Non-admin users cannot update CMS via API (returns 403)
action_items: Minor: Check and fix the broken image on About page 'The Employability Gap' section
seed_data_creation: Test CMS content created with 'TEST_' prefix for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS inline editing feature fully implemented and tested. Admin credentials: admin@skillcircuit.com / Chh@jer. All pages (Home, About, Courses, Contact, Navbar, Footer) have editable content. EditableText and EditableImage components show pencil icon on hover for admins. Content saves to MongoDB cms_content collection via PUT /api/admin/cms endpoint.

cms_features_verified.access_control: Admin-only editing, content visible to all users
